summary: Package fetches payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/index.js (line 14) issues a fetch to https://pub-0dc3e1677e894f07bbea11b17a29e032.r2.dev, an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket — a known payload-distribution infrastructure pattern observed in prior npm cluster compromises. The call sits alongside reads of process.platform and process.versions, consistent with platform-aware payload selection. R2 buckets at this URL shape are mutable and unauthenticated; the publisher cannot guarantee the bytes installers receive at any given moment, and the host pattern matches infrastructure used to drop platform-native binaries via npm packages. There is no version pinning, hash verification, or publisher-owned domain involved in the fetch, and the destination is not associated with a legitimate runtime CDN matching this package's stated purpose (a Claude Code router shared library).

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
